title: Aureline work-item offline-draft packet vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the offline_draft_packet_record frozen in docs/work_items/offline_draft_and_reconciliation_contract.md. One record family preserves the typed local change set a user authored against a provider-owned (or local-only) work item under a provider outage, an intentional offline-only session, a managed-workstation no-system-browser environment, a restricted-trust workspace, an unsatisfied freshness floor, a pending policy-epoch re-evaluation, a pending account-mapping resolution, a pending step-up authenticator, or a user-explicit deferral into a draft. The packet pins the bound work_item_detail_record, the bound change_intent / status_transition_packet / external_publish_preview / offline_handoff_packet refs the draft was authored against, the typed draft_origin_class (how the draft was authored), the intended_target_block (which target account / install grant / delegated token / browser-handoff session / managed-admin lane / pending-mapping / local-only target the draft would publish to once reconciled), the ordered local_change_set rows (per typed change kind: provider field overwrite / append / unset / unchanged-local-only / pending-resolution / comment append / linked-review update / validation-evidence attach-or-detach / linked-branch attach-or-detach), the typed expiry_window_block (authored_at, expires_at, freshness_floor_ref, extension_admissibility_class), the typed reconciliation_strategy_class the apply path resolves the draft under (try_publish_now_when_online_within_expiry / queue_for_publish_later_within_expiry / route_through_browser_handoff_when_browser_available / capture_offline_pending_drain / inspect_only_what_if_no_apply / re_review_required_after_expiry / archive_local_only_no_provider_path), the typed conflict_disclosure_block (populated when reconciliation observes a conflict between local draft and provider state), and the typed draft_lifecycle_class. The packet never claims the provider has accepted the draft; the safe default for draft_lifecycle_class is drafted_pending_reconciliation and the apply path runs through a fresh provider_reconciliation_record, a fresh approval ticket, and a fresh provider-callback envelope before the packet may flip to published_clean. Composes with the work_item_detail_record schema (the bound detail row), the change_intent_record schema (rationale / target scope / linked review / approvals), the status_transition_packet_record schema (the captured transition the draft was authored against), the external_publish_preview_record schema (the projected before / after labels), the offline_handoff_packet_record schema (the captured-under-unavailability packet the draft attaches to when the user authored under provider unreachable / browser-blocked / restricted-trust / freshness-unsatisfied / policy-pending / account-pending / step-up-pending / explicit-deferred conditions), the provider_reconciliation_record schema (the typed reconciliation outcome the apply path mints when the draft drains), the publish-later contract (publish_later_queue_item_record, provider_consequence_preview_record, account_mapping_binding_record, provider_callback_envelope_record, browser_handoff_packet_record), and the provider_object_record / traceability_link_record schemas (cited by reference from local-change-set rows that affect a typed provider field or a typed cross-object relation). Raw provider URLs, raw provider issue bodies, raw comment bodies, raw label values that disclose customer / tenant identity, raw delegated tokens, raw branch / commit URLs, raw author identity strings, raw absolute paths, raw notification payloads, and raw automation payloads never cross this boundary regardless of redaction class. The eventual work-items crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new record_kind, draft_origin_class, local_change_kind_class, reconciliation_strategy_class, draft_lifecycle_class, conflict_origin_class, extension_admissibility_class, denial_reason, or audit_event_id is additive-minor and bumps offline_draft_packet_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

offline_draft_packet_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the offline-draft packet vocabulary. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles / queue-review rollups / admin-reconciliation consoles. Raw provider URLs, raw provider issue bodies, raw comment bodies, raw delegated tokens, raw branch / commit URLs, raw author identity strings, raw absolute paths, raw notification payloads, and raw automation payloads never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_label.description: Redaction-aware reviewable label (<= 1024 graphemes). Carries a presentation-only summary safe for support / audit / queue-review / admin-reconciliation surfaces; never carries the raw payload.

reviewable_sentence.description: Short human-readable sentence safe to show in preview, queue-review, and export review surfaces. Never carries the raw payload.

trust_posture.description: ADR-0001 workspace-trust state the offline-draft packet was authored under.

redaction_class.description: Declared redaction class re-exported from ADR-0010 / ADR-0007. Raw payloads never cross this boundary regardless of class.

target_account_class.description: Target-account class re-exported verbatim from schemas/work_items/external_publish_preview.schema.json. Names which connected-provider account / install grant / delegated token / browser-handoff session / managed-admin lane / pending-mapping / local-only target the draft would publish to once reconciled.

provider_field_class.description: Provider-field class re-exported verbatim from schemas/work_items/provider_object.schema.json so a draft change-set row that overwrites / appends / unsets a provider field cites the same vocabulary the projection schema uses.

draft_origin_class.description: Frozen draft-origin class. Names how the draft was authored. Every imported_from_* value marks the draft as evidence-only with no live provider path; ai_proposed_pending_user_confirmation forbids any reconciliation strategy outside inspect_only_what_if_no_apply or archive_local_only_no_provider_path until a human actor confirms; managed_admin_minted_local_draft / policy_admin_minted_local_draft pin admin-minted overlays.

local_change_kind_class.description: Frozen local-change kind class for one row in the draft's local_change_set list. Provider-field rows MUST cite a typed provider_field_class plus before / after labels; local-only rows (comment_append_local_draft / linked_review_update_local_draft / etc.) MUST cite the bound artifact ref.

extension_admissibility_class.description: Frozen extension-admissibility class for the expiry_window_block. Pre-resolves whether the draft's expires_at MAY be extended without re-authoring the draft. extension_not_admissible_re_review_after_expiry_required is the safe default; the reviewer sees typed expiry truth instead of a silently-extended deadline.

reconciliation_strategy_class.description: Frozen reconciliation-strategy class. Names the apply path the draft will resolve under. try_publish_now_when_online_within_expiry pins an immediate publish on connectivity restoration within the expiry window; queue_for_publish_later_within_expiry admits the draft into the publish-later queue; route_through_browser_handoff_when_browser_available routes through a typed browser-handoff packet on browser availability; capture_offline_pending_drain pins the draft to the bound offline-handoff packet's drain path; inspect_only_what_if_no_apply pins a structured what-if review with no apply path; re_review_required_after_expiry pins a draft whose expiry has elapsed and MUST be re-reviewed before reconciliation; archive_local_only_no_provider_path pins a local-only archival with no provider path.

draft_lifecycle_class.description: Frozen draft-lifecycle class. The packet's lifecycle is rendered explicitly on issue / planning, queue-review, support-export, and admin-reconciliation surfaces. drafted_pending_reconciliation is the safe default; published_clean_via_provider_reconciliation is admissible only when the bound provider_reconciliation_record resolves clean_publish_admissible AND the apply path observed a fresh provider_callback_envelope_record.

conflict_origin_class.description: Frozen conflict-origin class for one row in the conflict_disclosure_block.conflict_field_rows list. no_conflict_observed is the safe default emitted on a clean publish; the other twelve values pin the typed drift the reconciliation path observed between the offline draft and the live provider state.

provider_field_class.description: Required (and outside other) for provider_field_overwrite / provider_field_append / provider_field_unset / provider_field_unchanged_local_only / provider_field_pending_resolution rows; admissible only as other for non-field rows.

before_state_value_label.description: Reviewable label of the prior state observed at draft authoring time. Required non-empty for provider_field_overwrite / provider_field_append rows; empty when the row's kind has no prior-state slot.

after_state_value_label.description: Reviewable label of the proposed next state. Required non-empty for provider_field_overwrite / provider_field_append rows; empty when the row's kind has no next-state slot.

local_overlay_value_label.description: Reviewable label of the local-only overlay value. Required non-empty for provider_field_unchanged_local_only rows.

linked_artifact_record_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the bound artifact (review_workspace_record / change_object_record / patch_stack_record / branch_row / worktree_row / validation evidence record / release_artifact_record / traceability_link_record). Required non-empty for linked_review_update_local_draft / linked_change_or_patch_stack_update_local_draft / linked_branch_or_worktree_attach_or_detach_local_draft / validation_evidence_attach_or_detach_local_draft / blocking_relationship_change_local_draft / release_artifact_publish_local_draft rows.

linked_traceability_link_record_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the bound traceability_link_record when the row crosses the work-item boundary.

allOf.description: provider_field_overwrite / provider_field_append rows MUST cite a typed provider_field_class plus non-empty before / after labels.
provider_field_unset rows MUST cite a typed provider_field_class plus a non-empty before label (the value being unset).
provider_field_unchanged_local_only rows MUST cite a typed provider_field_class plus a non-empty local_overlay_value_label (the locally-only value that does not publish).

linked_review_update_local_draft / linked_change_or_patch_stack_update_local_draft / linked_branch_or_worktree_attach_or_detach_local_draft / validation_evidence_attach_or_detach_local_draft / blocking_relationship_change_local_draft / release_artifact_publish_local_draft rows MUST cite a non-empty linked_artifact_record_id_ref.

local_change_set_row.description: One row in the draft's local_change_set list. The packet carries an ordered list so a downstream queue-review / support-export / admin-reconciliation surface can render the draft's per-change typed truth (which provider field will overwrite, which review will update, which validation evidence will attach) instead of a single 'Save' summary.

target_account_subject_ref.description: Opaque ref to the bound target account / install grant / delegated token / browser-handoff session / managed-admin lane subject. Empty when target_account_class is local_only_no_provider_account.

connected_provider_record_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the bound connected_provider_record. Empty when target_account_class is local_only_no_provider_account, account_mapping_binding_pending_user_resolution, or browser_handoff_account_session_only.

target_object_identity_ref.description: Opaque ref to the bound provider object identity the draft targets. Empty when the draft is a local-draft create with no provider object yet.

target_object_label.description: Reviewable label for the bound provider object the draft targets (e.g. issue title, work-item summary). Never the raw provider URL or raw issue body.

intended_target_block.description: Intended-target block. Pins the typed target account / install grant / delegated token / browser-handoff session / managed-admin lane / pending-mapping / local-only target the draft would publish to once reconciled. local_only_no_provider_account forbids any provider-bound apply path.

expires_at.description: Monotonic timestamp after which the draft must not be reconciled without explicit re-review. The apply path denies an expired draft with policy_epoch_expired_re_evaluation_required or stale_intent_must_re_review_after_expiry.

freshness_floor_ref.description: Opaque ref to the freshness floor the draft was authored against. Empty admissible only when the draft was authored under no_network_offline or imported_from_* origins.

expiry_window_block.description: Expiry-window block. Pins the typed authored_at / expires_at / freshness_floor / extension-admissibility truth so a downstream surface can show typed 'safe to publish later' vs 'must re-review' truth without inspecting provider logs.

local_draft_value_label.description: Reviewable label of the local draft's value for this field at authoring time.

provider_remote_value_label.description: Reviewable label of the provider's current remote value for this field as observed at reconciliation time.

remote_observed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp the remote value was observed at reconciliation time. Empty when the conflict was observed without a fresh provider read (e.g. policy-epoch roll observed locally).

allOf.description: no_conflict_observed conflict-origin is forbidden in conflict_field_rows; that origin is admissible only on the conflict_disclosure_block when no conflict has been observed (and conflict_field_rows is empty).

conflict_field_row.description: One row in the conflict_disclosure_block.conflict_field_rows list. Each row pins the typed provider field, the typed conflict origin, the local-draft and provider-remote labels, and the observed-at timestamp so a downstream surface can render typed conflict truth without re-fetching the provider object.

conflict_field_rows.description: Ordered conflict-field rows. Empty array is admissible only when conflict_origin_class is no_conflict_observed.

linked_provider_reconciliation_record_id.description: Opaque ref to the bound provider_reconciliation_record that observed and disclosed the conflict. Empty only when conflict_origin_class is no_conflict_observed.

allOf.description: no_conflict_observed conflict-origin MUST resolve conflict_field_rows to an empty array.
Any conflict_origin_class outside no_conflict_observed MUST cite a non-empty linked_provider_reconciliation_record_id_ref AND at least one conflict_field_row.

conflict_disclosure_block.description: Conflict-disclosure block. The packet's safe default is conflict_origin_class = no_conflict_observed plus an empty conflict_field_rows list; reconciliation populates this block with the typed conflict origin and per-field rows when a conflict is observed between local draft and provider state.

origin_disclosure.description: Canonical Aureline origin the draft was authored under. Revalidated at reconciliation; a reconciliation against a mismatched origin denies.

policy_context.description: Policy context the draft was authored under. Revalidated at reconciliation; a policy-epoch roll between authoring and reconciliation re-evaluates the draft.

denial_reason.description: Closed denial-reason vocabulary. stale_intent_must_re_review_after_expiry / expired_draft_must_not_silently_publish are the gates that forbid an expired draft from silently advancing to published_clean without a fresh re-review; conflict_observed_must_block_silent_publish / superseded_remote_state_must_block_silent_publish / missing_authority_must_block_silent_publish / account_mismatch_must_block_silent_publish gate silent publish under conflict / superseded / missing-authority / account-mismatch reconciliation outcomes.

audit_event_id.description: Closed audit-event vocabulary for the offline-draft packet lifecycle.

work_item_detail_record_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the bound work_item_detail_record the draft was authored against. The packet never floats free of a work-item row.

linked_change_intent_record_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the bound change_intent_record so the rationale, target scope, linked review, approvals, and validation evidence stay visible. Empty only when the draft was authored without a structured change-intent (rare).

linked_status_transition_packet_record_i.description: Opaque ref to the bound status_transition_packet_record the draft was authored against. Empty admissible only when the draft is a comment-only or rename-only draft with no structured transition packet.

linked_external_publish_preview_record_i.description: Opaque ref to the bound external_publish_preview_record so the projected before / after labels stay visible across the draft. Empty for archive_local_only_no_provider_path or inspect_only_what_if_no_apply strategies that have no provider preview.

linked_offline_handoff_packet_record_id_.description: Opaque ref to the bound offline_handoff_packet_record the draft attaches to when authored under provider unreachable / browser-blocked / imported-from-offline-handoff conditions, OR when the reconciliation_strategy_class is capture_offline_pending_drain. Required for those conditions; admissible (but not required) for restricted-trust / freshness-unsatisfied / policy-pending / account-pending / step-up-pending / user-deferred origins.

linked_publish_later_queue_item_record_i.description: Opaque ref to the bound publish_later_queue_item_record. Required when reconciliation_strategy_class is queue_for_publish_later_within_expiry OR draft_lifecycle_class is queued_for_publish_within_expiry.

linked_browser_handoff_packet_ref.description: Opaque ref to the bound browser_handoff_packet_record. Required when reconciliation_strategy_class is route_through_browser_handoff_when_browser_available OR draft_origin_class is human_authored_browser_handoff_blocked.

linked_account_mapping_binding_record_id.description: Opaque ref to the bound account_mapping_binding_record. Required when intended_target_block.target_account_class is account_mapping_binding_pending_user_resolution OR draft_origin_class is human_authored_account_mapping_pending OR draft_lifecycle_class is blocked_by_account_mismatch_pending_user_action.

linked_provider_reconciliation_record_id.description: Opaque ref to the bound provider_reconciliation_record that resolved the draft. Required when draft_lifecycle_class is published_clean_via_provider_reconciliation OR blocked_by_conflict_pending_re_review OR blocked_by_superseded_remote_state_pending_re_review OR blocked_by_missing_authority_pending_user_action OR blocked_by_account_mismatch_pending_user_action OR archived_local_only_no_provider_path.

linked_provider_callback_envelope_record.description: Opaque refs to provider_callback_envelope_records that confirmed (or rejected) provider acceptance after reconciliation. Required non-empty when draft_lifecycle_class is published_clean_via_provider_reconciliation.

local_change_set.description: Ordered local-change-set rows. MUST carry at least one row; an empty draft is forbidden (the user has nothing to reconcile).

supersedes_offline_draft_packet_record_i.description: Opaque ref to a prior offline_draft_packet_record this one supersedes (e.g. after the user re-authored under a refreshed freshness floor or a re-resolved account mapping).

superseded_by_offline_draft_packet_recor.description: Opaque ref to the offline_draft_packet_record that superseded this one when draft_lifecycle_class is superseded_by_offline_draft_packet_record.

rationale_summary.description: Optional reviewable rationale summary forwarded from the bound change_intent_record so consumers that read the draft alone (queue-review, support-export) can surface the rationale without re-fetching the change intent.

block_reason_summary.description: Optional reviewable summary of the blocking reason. Required when draft_lifecycle_class is one of the blocked_* lanes; empty otherwise.

withdrawn_at.description: Required non-empty ISO 8601 timestamp when draft_lifecycle_class is withdrawn_before_apply; empty otherwise.

allOf.description: ai_proposed_pending_user_confirmation draft origin MUST resolve reconciliation_strategy_class to inspect_only_what_if_no_apply OR archive_local_only_no_provider_path until a human actor confirms.
imported_from_* draft origins MUST resolve reconciliation_strategy_class to inspect_only_what_if_no_apply OR archive_local_only_no_provider_path.
local_only_no_provider_account target MUST resolve reconciliation_strategy_class to archive_local_only_no_provider_path OR inspect_only_what_if_no_apply.
queue_for_publish_later_within_expiry strategy MUST cite a non-empty linked_publish_later_queue_item_record_id_ref.
route_through_browser_handoff_when_browser_available strategy MUST cite a non-empty linked_browser_handoff_packet_ref.
capture_offline_pending_drain strategy MUST cite a non-empty linked_offline_handoff_packet_record_id_ref.
account_mapping_binding_pending_user_resolution target MUST cite a non-empty linked_account_mapping_binding_record_id_ref.
queued_for_publish_within_expiry lifecycle MUST cite a non-empty linked_publish_later_queue_item_record_id_ref.
routed_through_browser_handoff_pending_browser lifecycle MUST cite a non-empty linked_browser_handoff_packet_ref.
captured_offline_pending_drain lifecycle MUST cite a non-empty linked_offline_handoff_packet_record_id_ref.
published_clean_via_provider_reconciliation lifecycle MUST cite a non-empty linked_provider_reconciliation_record_id_ref AND a non-empty linked_provider_callback_envelope_record_id_refs.

blocked_by_conflict_pending_re_review lifecycle MUST cite a non-empty linked_provider_reconciliation_record_id_ref AND resolve conflict_disclosure_block.conflict_origin_class outside no_conflict_observed.

blocked_by_superseded_remote_state_pending_re_review / blocked_by_missing_authority_pending_user_action / blocked_by_account_mismatch_pending_user_action / archived_local_only_no_provider_path lifecycles MUST cite a non-empty linked_provider_reconciliation_record_id_ref.
blocked_by_account_mismatch_pending_user_action lifecycle MUST cite a non-empty linked_account_mapping_binding_record_id_ref.
Every blocked_* lifecycle MUST cite a non-empty block_reason_summary so a downstream surface renders typed denial copy instead of generic 'something failed' text.
expired_re_review_required lifecycle MUST resolve reconciliation_strategy_class to re_review_required_after_expiry.
withdrawn_before_apply lifecycle MUST cite a non-empty withdrawn_at.
superseded_by_offline_draft_packet_record lifecycle MUST cite a non-empty superseded_by_offline_draft_packet_record_id_ref.

Captured-under-unavailability draft origins MUST cite a non-empty linked_offline_handoff_packet_record_id_ref so the captured-state truth survives across lifecycle. user_deferred_explicit_choice and ai_proposed / managed_admin / policy_admin origins may author without an offline-handoff packet.

offline_draft_packet_record.description: Frozen offline-draft packet for one local change set authored against a provider-owned (or local-only) work item under a provider outage, an intentional offline-only session, a managed-workstation no-system-browser environment, a restricted-trust workspace, an unsatisfied freshness floor, a pending policy-epoch re-evaluation, a pending account-mapping resolution, a pending step-up authenticator, or a user-explicit deferral into a draft. The packet preserves the typed local change set, the typed intended target, the typed expiry window, the typed reconciliation strategy, and the typed conflict disclosure so a downstream surface can render mechanically what is queued, what is expired, and what conflicts before the user re-confirms.

allOf.description: offline_draft_packet_audit_denial_emitted MUST cite a denial reason.

offline_draft_packet_audit_event_record.description: Audit-event row for the offline-draft packet lifecycle. Denial events MUST cite a typed reason from the closed denial vocabulary.
